raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution framing above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The request implies checking whether the relaxation, empirical transition, adapted bound, and final guarantee form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"Strengthening the draft requires ensuring the reported drift curves, robustness checks, and bound actually support the stated claims.","R1.5":"The passage may need section- or paragraph-level reordering to improve its narrative arc from prior work to gap, method, findings, and contribution.","R1.6":"A broad request to make academic prose stronger centrally includes improving clarity, flow, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of strengthening is intended by the terse delegation.","RX.2":"The responsibility includes avoiding stronger language that would overstate convergence, novelty, or practitioner applicability beyond the artifact.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection and not perform the requested rewrite or critique of the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly or technical claims that could cause downstream misuse.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: Making the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution framing above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The request implies checking whether the relaxation, empirical transition, adapted bound, and final guarantee form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Strengthening the draft requires ensuring the reported drift curves, robustness checks, and bound actually support the stated claims.
rationale.R1.5: The passage may need section- or paragraph-level reordering to improve its narrative arc from prior work to gap, method, findings, and contribution.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request to make academic prose stronger centrally includes improving clarity, flow, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of strengthening is intended by the terse delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The responsibility includes avoiding stronger language that would overstate convergence, novelty, or practitioner applicability beyond the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection and not perform the requested rewrite or critique of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scholarly or technical claims that could cause downstream misuse.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact.
